catalogservice.description: MCP server for SAP Datasphere Catalog Service (OData).

batch_for_catalogservice.description: Execute multiple OData operations in a single batch.

count_spaces_for_catalogservice.description: Get the total count of spaces.

get_space_in_assets_for_catalogservice.description: Navigate from assets to the related space.

connections.description: MCP server for SAP Datasphere Connections API.

RetrieveConnectionOfSpace.description: Returns the definition of a connection in a space.

UpdateConnectionInSpace.description: Updates a connection in a space.

DeleteConnectionInSpace.description: Deletes a connection from a space.

ValidateConnectionInSpace.description: Validates a connection in a space.

ListConnectionsInSpace.description: Returns a list of connections available in a space.

CreateConnectionInSpace.description: Creates a connection in a space.

listExecutionGraphs.description: Lists all graphs of the runtime.

deleteExecutionGraph.description: Delete or stop a specific graph.

DELETE_v1_runtime_restartgroups_restartG.description: Remove all graphs in a restart group.

getGraphDescription.description: Get graph description of a handle.

list_spaces.description: List all Datasphere spaces the current user has access to.

get_space.description: Get detailed information about a single Datasphere space.

list_entities.description: List entities (views, tables, analytical models, etc.) in a Datasphere space.

get_entity.description: Retrieve the full JSON definition of a single entity from a Datasphere space.

get_entity_status.description: Get the current deployment status of an entity.

validate_entity.description: Validate an entity definition without persisting or deploying it.

entityPayload.description: Full entity definition JSON to validate

warnings.message: Column NET_AMOUNT has no currency column assigned

create_graphical_view.description: Create a new Graphical View using a visual node-based definition.

definition.description: Node graph definition with source nodes, join conditions, projections, filters, aggregations, and calculated columns

mock_response.message: Graphical view V_MONTHLY_REVENUE_BY_REGION created successfully in space SALES_SPACE. Call deploy_entity to activate.

update_graphical_view.description: Update an existing Graphical View definition.

create_sql_view.description: Create a new SQL View (Transformation View) using a SQL SELECT statement.

sqlScript.description: Full HANA SQL SELECT statement. Supports CTEs, window functions, aggregations, CASE WHEN, UNION.

inputParameters.description: Runtime input parameters referenced as $$PARAM_NAME$$ in SQL

mock_response.message: SQL view V_REVENUE_WINDOW_ANALYSIS created successfully in space SALES_SPACE. Call deploy_entity to activate.

update_sql_view.description: Update the SQL script and metadata of an existing SQL View.

create_analytical_model.description: Create a new Analytical Model (star schema semantic layer) for SAC consumption.

factSource.description: technicalName of the Fact View or Relational Dataset

mock_response.message: Analytical model AM_SALES_ANALYTICS created successfully in space SALES_SPACE. Call deploy_entity to activate.

create_data_flow.description: Create a new Data Flow ETL/ELT pipeline.

sourceEntity.description: technicalName of the source table or view

targetEntity.description: technicalName of the target local table

mock_response.message: Data flow DF_SALES_INCREMENTAL_LOAD created in space SALES_SPACE. Call deploy_entity to activate, then run via task chain.

update_data_flow.description: Update an existing Data Flow definition.

create_dimension_view.description: Create a Dimension View (semanticUsage=DIMENSION) for master data slicing.

mock_response.message: Dimension view DIM_CUSTOMER created in space SALES_SPACE. Call deploy_entity to activate.

create_fact_view.description: Create a Fact View (semanticUsage=FACT) with declared measures and dimension associations.

mock_response.message: Fact view FACT_SALES created in space SALES_SPACE with 3 measures and 2 dimension associations. Call deploy_entity to activate.

create_er_model.description: Create an ER Model for data governance documentation.

mock_response.message: ER model ER_SALES_SCHEMA created with 5 entities and 4 associations.

create_task_chain.description: Create a Task Chain to orchestrate and schedule Data Flow executions.

mock_response.message: Task chain TC_NIGHTLY_REFRESH created with 3 tasks. Call deploy_entity to activate.

delete_entity.description: Delete an entity from a Datasphere space. WARNING: Irreversible.

deploy_entity.description: Deploy an entity to Datasphere HANA Cloud, making it queryable.

mock_response.message: Deployment started. Poll get_deploy_job_status with jobId=deploy-job-abc123.

undeploy_entity.description: Undeploy an entity from Datasphere HANA Cloud.

get_deploy_job_status.description: Poll the status of an asynchronous deploy or undeploy job.

mock_response.message: Deployment completed successfully. Entity is now DEPLOYED and queryable.

list_entity_impact.description: Get impact analysis: which entities depend on the given entity.

list_entity_lineage.description: Get upstream data lineage for an entity.

get_column_suggestions.description: Get column name and type suggestions from source entities for view design.
